# ElectroBridge

ElectroBridge is an electronics and semiconductor opportunity aggregator for Indian researchers and engineers.

## What we do
We aggregate JRF, PhD, government research jobs, and private sector opportunities in electronics and semiconductor industry. We update daily from official sources including DRDO, ISRO, CSIR, IITs, and international sources.

## Our data
- Opportunities feed: https://electrobridge.vercel.app/api/opportunities-feed
- Sitemap: https://electrobridge.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- About: https://electrobridge.vercel.app/about
- Resources: https://electrobridge.vercel.app/resources

## Contact
For corrections or additions: admin@electrobridge.vercel.app

## Update frequency
Opportunities: Daily | News: Every 6 hours
